value.found_quote: It uses operating system primitives to restrict the filesystem and network access of every Bash command Claude runs: Seatbelt, the built-in macOS sandbox, and bubblewrap on Linux and WSL2.
value.rationale: The page describes the built-in sandboxed Bash tool, which uses OS-level primitives (Seatbelt, bubblewrap) to enforce filesystem and network restrictions. This directly substantiates the claim that the offering enforces filesystem and network restrictions at the OS level. It is described as built into Claude Code and currently available.
